Off Calendar Jul-18-2024 Continued To Feb-10-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Response To Request For Peoduction Of Documents; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-15-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT MOHAN BALAJI's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Response To Request For Peoduction Of Documents; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant Balaji's Motion to Compel Further Responses to RFP is denied for failure to file a separate statement and because the Motion is Moot (see Opposition, Ex. A). All requests for sanctions are denied.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at peter.catalanotti@wilsonelser.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)
